description: This file is a React component for a note-taking application's main page, including note listing, editing, and UI interactions.

methods.name: sortNotes
methods.description: Sorts notes prioritizing pinned notes and most recent updates.

methods.name: Home
methods.description: Main React component managing notes, tags, and editor UI.

methods.name: handleCreateNote
methods.description: Creates a new note and updates the UI.

methods.name: togglePinned
methods.description: Toggles the pinned status of a note.

methods.name: toggleFavorite
methods.description: Toggles the favorite status of a note.
